array.string: export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:$HOME/.local/bin"; cd "${WRIT_HOME:-$HOME/wvoid-fm}" && mkdir -p "$HOME/Library/Logs/writ" && exec bash mac/operator_daemon.sh >> "$HOME/Library/Logs/writ/operator_launchd.log" 2>> "$HOME/Library/Logs/writ/operator_launchd.err.log"
